expected_behavior: A valid proposal with local path refs, source IDs, claim IDs, local evidence IDs, and a ledger URL stores under .krn/proposals.
failure_mode: KRN can persist proposal-looking objects without proving their source refs resolve to source-backed project truth.

expected_behavior: Storing the same proposal twice returns the existing proposal path without creating a second file.
failure_mode: Proposal persistence is not idempotent and cannot safely back a future proposal tool.

expected_behavior: A schema-valid proposal with source refs absent from the source ledger and local files is rejected before persistence.
assertions: known-bad source-ref fixture parses as proposal
known-bad source-ref fixture rejected by store
failure_mode: KRN accepts source-looking strings as source-backed evidence without checking the ledger or filesystem.

expected_behavior: A proposal targeting a path outside the target root is rejected before persistence.
failure_mode: Proposal persistence accepts path traversal and weakens the future proposal-tool safety boundary.
